title: salvia simplex
intro: Salvia simplex, also known as Blue Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the mint family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Salvia simplex include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. The herbal preparations of Salvia simplex can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
intro_study: According to "Journal of natural products", Salvia simplex has benefits due to its bioactive triterpenoids which have diverse biological activities.
